## Checklist

- [ ] The PR title follows `type(scope): summary` in English.
- [ ] This PR contains one coherent outcome and no unrelated changes.
- [ ] Tests cover changed behavior where practical.
- [ ] Credentials, tokens, private media data, generated output, and temporary files are excluded.
- [ ] Breaking changes and migration or rescan requirements are clearly documented.
